query:
UPDATE follow_ups
SET dataFollowUp = '2026-01-15 12:00:00'
WHERE leadId = (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE '%Marcio Lira%' LIMIT 1)
  AND status = 'pendente';

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT 
  f.id,
  f.dataFollowUp,
  DATE(f.dataFollowUp) as data,
  TIME(f.dataFollowUp) as hora_utc,
  l.nome as leadNome
FROM follow_ups f
INNER JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
WHERE l.nome LIKE '%Marcio Lira%';
